prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `bc93ec48`.
codex_response:
Implemented `bc93ec48` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: identify small corner-anchored objects and copy each one clockwise to the next corner, overlaying the copy onto the original grid without removing the source object. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting hypothesis; I did not use the Sonnet “corner regions rotate” framing verbatim because the official examples show copy/overlay, not swap/removal, and I recorded that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bc93ec48/notes.md).

The package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bc93ec48/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bc93ec48/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bc93ec48/generator.py). The generator stays close to the task family: square grids with background `7`, small corner bars/squares/L-shapes, optional one missing source corner, sparse small distractors, and no ambiguous overlapping copied objects. No new low-level primitive was needed.

Validation passed:
- `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task bc93ec48`: `4/4` official examples passed.
- `python -m arc2.shared.build --task bc93ec48 --n-examples 1000`: succeeded.
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task bc93ec48`: `1000/1000` generated examples passed.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bc93ec48/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bc93ec48/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bc93ec48/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bc93ec48/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bc93ec48/previews/preview_03.png).
